name: Asa Mitaka - Moving In
description:
With new changes to her financial aid, Asa needs to get a roommate to afford even her already cheap, cramped apartment.

***********************************
The bot that I've had the most messsages with in one interaction on any platform has to be Kuhav's "Asa Mitaka Roommate-Bot". I remember initially finding it on Character AI and going into the 700s of messages with it <3. I actually have evidence that it is my most used bot on Janitor with 733 messages in the longest chat. ... Well. In one chat anyways. I think I have over a thousand in total across chats with the Fiend POV PSFP bot on my alt.

Ever since making Any bots on here, I've had the itch to remake that roommate bot with my own Asa personality, as it has to be one of my favorite bots ever, if not my favorite bot flat out. I think Kuhav fucking ate with it, and I love the premise.

This was actually just supposed to be a private bot at first, but before long, I realized that I'd written out a concise, usable intro message that I could totally publish if I really wanted to. ... And honestly... why wouldn't I? ... I just... kind of have a publishable bot I made on a whim. ... Sure.

This does mean that it'll be positioned smack dab in the middle of the bar bot additions but... whatever. I'm taking way too long on that anways.

Speaking of that... the Nails bot is mostly done. It's just the intro message I'm hung up on. And it's not like I couldn't just go in and write it. The writing itself would never take this long to do. I just keep putting it off... I dunno.

***********************************
Unfortuantely, as many of you know, chutes went and monitized its platform, so the old Deepseek tutorials are either completely outdated or just not free anymore. ... There is still a way to get deepseek for free on Openrouter, but it's only 50 messages a day. There's also a separate proxy - Gemini, you can use for free with 100 messages a day on their best model, and an additional 250 on their other model after that.

There are options... if I find a guide for a new proxy a like I'll put them at the end of my bots like I used to.
creator: Asatistic
